channel.title: Tableau on jtheol
channel.description: Recent content in Tableau on jtheol

item.title: Employee Churn Dashboard
item.description: View on Tableau Public Developed a dashboard to give an overview of employee churn.

item.title: Humanitarian Aid Worker Security Incidents
item.description: View on Tableau Public Built a Tableau dashboard to visualize humanitarian aid worker security incidents, with functionality to analyze trends in tactics, total incidents, and the countries where they were affected most

item.title: NYC Real Estate Dashboard
item.description: View on Tableau Public Developed a dashboard to analyze new york real estate.
